# ToolForge

> The curated stack of AI tools that actually work. Honest reviews, head-to-head comparisons, and playbooks for using AI in your business.

ToolForge is an editorially independent directory of 140+ AI tools across coding, writing, image generation, video, audio, research, productivity, and business automation. Updated weekly with new reviews, comparisons, and how-to guides.

## Pages

### Home
- [Homepage](https://toolforge.io/): Browse 130+ curated AI tools, sorted by category
- [Browse all tools](https://toolforge.io/tools.html): Full directory with filters
- [Stack Quiz](https://toolforge.io/stack-quiz.html): Interactive quiz that recommends your AI stack
- [Best deals](https://toolforge.io/deals.html): Current promotions and discounts

### Tool Reviews (140+ tools)

#### Coding
- [Cursor](https://toolforge.io/tools/cursor.html): The AI-first code editor built on VSCode
- [Claude Code](https://toolforge.io/tools/claude-code.html): Anthropic's CLI coding agent
- [GitHub Copilot](https://toolforge.io/tools/github-copilot.html): The original AI pair programmer
- [JetBrains AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/jetbrains-ai.html): AI for IntelliJ/PyCharm/WebStorm
- [Sourcegraph Cody](https://toolforge.io/tools/sourcegraph-cody.html): AI coding assistant with deep codebase context
- [Blackbox AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/blackbox-ai.html): Multi-model coding AI
- [Devin](https://toolforge.io/tools/devin.html): Autonomous AI software engineer
- [Windsurf](https://toolforge.io/tools/windsurf.html): Cursor competitor with Cascade agent
- [Cline](https://toolforge.io/tools/cline.html): Open-source AI coding agent
- [Aider](https://toolforge.io/tools/aider.html): AI pair programming in your terminal
- [Continue](https://toolforge.io/tools/continue.html): Open-source AI code assistant
- [Tabnine](https://toolforge.io/tools/tabnine.html): Enterprise code completion
- [Codeium](https://toolforge.io/tools/codeium.html): Free AI code completion
- [Replit Agent](https://toolforge.io/tools/replit-agent.html): AI app builder inside Replit
- [Bolt New](https://toolforge.io/tools/bolt-new.html): AI web app builder
- [v0](https://toolforge.io/tools/v0.html): Vercel's AI UI generator
- [Lovable](https://toolforge.io/tools/lovable.html): AI full-stack app builder
- [Phind](https://toolforge.io/tools/phind.html): AI search engine for developers
- [Warp](https://toolforge.io/tools/warp.html): AI-powered terminal
- [Amazon Q Developer](https://toolforge.io/tools/amazon-q-developer.html): AWS coding agent

- [supermaven](https://toolforge.io/tools/supermaven.html): The fastest AI code completion. Sub-100ms autocomplete, 1M token context.
#### LLMs / Chat
- [ChatGPT](https://toolforge.io/tools/chatgpt.html): OpenAI's flagship chatbot
- [Claude 3.7 Sonnet](https://toolforge.io/tools/claude-3-7.html): Anthropic's reasoning-focused model
- [Gemini 2](https://toolforge.io/tools/gemini-2.html): Google's multimodal flagship
- [DeepSeek](https://toolforge.io/tools/deepseek.html): Open-weight Chinese LLM
- [Mistral](https://toolforge.io/tools/mistral.html): Open-weight European AI
- [Grok](https://toolforge.io/tools/grok.html): xAI's unfiltered chatbot
- [Qwen](https://toolforge.io/tools/qwen.html): Alibaba's open LLM
- [Pi AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/pi-ai.html): Inflection's empathetic chatbot
- [Perplexity](https://toolforge.io/tools/perplexity.html): AI search engine with citations
- [Microsoft Copilot](https://toolforge.io/tools/microsoft-copilot.html): Microsoft 365's AI assistant

#### Image Generation
- [Midjourney](https://toolforge.io/tools/midjourney.html): Best-in-class AI image generation
- [DALL-E 3](https://toolforge.io/tools/dall-e-3.html): OpenAI's image generator
- [Stable Diffusion](https://toolforge.io/tools/stable-diffusion.html): Open-source image model
- [Flux](https://toolforge.io/tools/flux.html): Black Forest Labs' photorealistic model
- [Leonardo AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/leonardo-ai.html): Game-asset focused image gen
- [Ideogram](https://toolforge.io/tools/ideogram.html): Best at text rendering in images
- [Krea](https://toolforge.io/tools/krea.html): Real-time AI image generation
- [Lexica](https://toolforge.io/tools/lexica.html): Stable Diffusion search engine
- [Recraft](https://toolforge.io/tools/recraft.html): Vector and brand-style image AI
- [Adobe Firefly](https://toolforge.io/tools/adobe-firefly.html): Commercially-safe image AI

#### Video Generation
- [Runway](https://toolforge.io/tools/runway.html): Hollywood-grade AI video editor
- [Sora](https://toolforge.io/tools/sora.html): OpenAI's flagship video model
- [Veo](https://toolforge.io/tools/veo.html): Google's video generation model
- [Kling](https://toolforge.io/tools/kling.html): Chinese video model with strong motion
- [Pika](https://toolforge.io/tools/pika.html): Viral video AI with Pikaffects
- [Luma](https://toolforge.io/tools/luma.html): Dream Machine video generator
- [Hailuo](https://toolforge.io/tools/hailuo.html): MiniMax's free video model
- [Pixverse](https://toolforge.io/tools/pixverse.html): Fast video generation
- [Vidu](https://toolforge.io/tools/vidu.html): Chinese video model
- [Hedra](https://toolforge.io/tools/hedra.html): Character video generation
- [Hailuo](https://toolforge.io/tools/hailuo.html): Free video gen

- [higgsfield](https://toolforge.io/tools/higgsfield.html): The TikTok-native AI video generator. Vertical-first, character consistency.
#### Writing & Content
- [Jasper](https://toolforge.io/tools/jasper.html): Brand-voice AI marketing writer
- [Copy.ai](https://toolforge.io/tools/copy-ai.html): Workflow AI for marketing teams
- [Writesonic](https://toolforge.io/tools/writesonic.html): Budget AI writer with SEO mode
- [Rytr](https://toolforge.io/tools/rytr.html): Affordable AI writing assistant
- [Sudowrite](https://toolforge.io/tools/sudowrite.html): AI for fiction writers
- [Frase](https://toolforge.io/tools/frase.html): SEO content optimizer
- [Surfer AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/surfer-ai.html): SEO content that ranks
- [Anyword](https://toolforge.io/tools/anyword.html): AI copywriting with performance scoring
- [QuillBot](https://toolforge.io/tools/quillbot.html): AI paraphrasing and grammar
- [Wordtune](https://toolforge.io/tools/wordtune.html): AI sentence rewriter
- [Hemingway](https://toolforge.io/tools/hemingway.html): Writing clarity editor
- [Originality AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/originality-ai.html): AI content detector
- [GPTZero](https://toolforge.io/tools/gptzero.html): AI content detection

#### Audio / Voice
- [ElevenLabs](https://toolforge.io/tools/elevenlabs.html): Best-in-class AI voice generation
- [Murf](https://toolforge.io/tools/murf.html): AI voiceover studio
- [PlayHT](https://toolforge.io/tools/playht.html): AI text-to-speech
- [Speechify](https://toolforge.io/tools/speechify.html): Text-to-speech reader
- [Descript](https://toolforge.io/tools/descript.html): AI audio/video editor
- [Podcastle](https://toolforge.io/tools/podcastle.html): AI podcast studio
- [Resemble](https://toolforge.io/tools/resemble.html): Voice cloning AI
- [Suno](https://toolforge.io/tools/suno.html): AI music generation
- [Udio](https://toolforge.io/tools/udio.html): AI music generation
- [AIVA](https://toolforge.io/tools/aiva.html): AI music composer with MIDI
- [Krisp](https://toolforge.io/tools/krisp.html): AI noise cancellation
- [Hume](https://toolforge.io/tools/hume.html): Empathic voice AI

#### Research & Knowledge
- [Perplexity](https://toolforge.io/tools/perplexity.html): AI search with citations
- [Consensus](https://toolforge.io/tools/consensus.html): AI research from peer-reviewed papers
- [Elicit](https://toolforge.io/tools/elicit.html): AI research assistant

- [You.com](https://toolforge.io/tools/you-com.html): AI search engine
- [NotebookLM](https://toolforge.io/tools/notebooklm.html): Google's AI research notebook
- [Julius AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/julius-ai.html): Chat with your data/spreadsheets

#### Productivity
- [Notion AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/notion-ai.html): AI inside Notion
- [Notion Calendar](https://toolforge.io/tools/notion-calendar.html): AI calendar app
- [Motion](https://toolforge.io/tools/motion.html): AI calendar and task manager
- [Reclaim](https://toolforge.io/tools/reclaim-ai.html): AI calendar scheduling
- [SaneBox](https://toolforge.io/tools/sanebox.html): AI email management
- [Superhuman AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/superhuman-ai.html): AI email triage
- [Mem](https://toolforge.io/tools/mem.html): AI note-taking app
- [Sunsama](https://toolforge.io/tools/sunsama.html): Daily planning AI
- [Saner AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/saner-ai.html): AI second brain
- [Fathom](https://toolforge.io/tools/fathom.html): AI meeting notes (free for coaches)
- [Otter AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/otter-ai.html): Live meeting transcription
- [Fireflies AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/fireflies-ai.html): AI meeting assistant
- [Granola](https://toolforge.io/tools/granola.html): AI meeting notes for Mac
- [Tactiq](https://toolforge.io/tools/tactiq.html): AI meeting transcripts
- [tl;dv](https://toolforge.io/tools/tl-dv.html): AI meeting recorder

- [read-ai](https://toolforge.io/tools/read-ai.html): The analytics-first meeting AI. Talk time, meeting score, sentiment analysis.
- [fyxer](https://toolforge.io/tools/fyxer.html): The AI email assistant that sorts, drafts, and replies in your voice. EU-hosted, GDPR-native.
- [wispr-flow](https://toolforge.io/tools/wispr-flow.html): The fastest voice-to-text dictation. Speak at 3x typing speed in any app.
- [glean](https://toolforge.io/tools/glean.html): Enterprise AI search across 100+ apps. Used by Databricks, Grammarly, Plaid.
#### Business Automation
- [Zapier](https://toolforge.io/tools/zapier.html): The original no-code automation
- [Make](https://toolforge.io/tools/make.html): Visual automation platform
- [n8n](https://toolforge.io/tools/n8n.html): Open-source automation
- [Manus](https://toolforge.io/tools/manus.html): Autonomous AI agent
- [Devin](https://toolforge.io/tools/devin.html): AI software engineer
- [Lindy](https://toolforge.io/tools/lindy.html): AI agent builder
- [Bardeen](https://toolforge.io/tools/bardeen.html): Browser automation AI
- [Apollo AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/apollo-ai.html): AI sales platform
- [Clay](https://toolforge.io/tools/clay.html): AI data enrichment
- [Lavender](https://toolforge.io/tools/lavender.html): AI sales email coach
- [Slack AI](https://toolforge.io/tools/slack-ai.html): AI summaries in Slack

- [intercom-fin](https://toolforge.io/tools/intercom-fin.html): Intercom's AI support agent. $0.99 per resolution. Native to Intercom.
- [decagon](https://toolforge.io/tools/decagon.html): AI customer support that resolves tickets autonomously. 60-80% L1/L2 resolution.
- [harvey-ai](https://toolforge.io/tools/harvey-ai.html): The legal AI unicorn. GPT-4 fine-tuned for law, used by 40%+ of AmLaw 100 firms.
- [casetext](https://toolforge.io/tools/casetext.html): The original legal AI, now part of Thomson Reuters CoCounsel. Affordable for solo lawyers.
#### AI Platforms
- [Hugging Face](https://toolforge.io/tools/huggingface.html): The GitHub of AI
- [Cohere](https://toolforge.io/tools/cohere.html): Enterprise LLM platform
- [Replicate](https://toolforge.io/tools/replicate.html): Run any model via API

- [Pictory](https://toolforge.io/tools/pictory.html): AI video from script
